zh.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特布頓 武安德 布利安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth De Bamburgh於1425年出生在英國肯特帕德萊斯沃斯時，她的父親John de Bamburgh20歲，母親Katherine Stanhope22歲。她於1444年與Sir Nicholas Wotton在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1494年住在英國英格蘭肯特布頓 武安德 布利安。她去世於1495年在英國肯特布頓 武安德 布利安享年70歲，埋葬在英國肯特布頓 馬爾海貝。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth De Bamburgh于1425年出生在英国肯特帕德萊斯沃斯时，她的父亲John de Bamburgh20岁，母亲Katherine Stanhope22岁。她于1444年与Sir Nicholas Wotton在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1494年住在英国英格兰肯特布頓 武安德 布利安。她去世于1495年在英国肯特布頓 武安德 布利安享年70岁，埋葬在英国肯特布頓 馬爾海貝。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bamburgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bamberg
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Bamberg in Bavaria (formerly in Upper Franconia).
History: Between 1007 and 1702 the city of Bamberg was the capital of a powerful ecclesiastical state, and in the 15th century the bishops of Bamberg were raised to princely rank.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth De Bamburgh was born in 1425, in Paddlesworth, Kent, England, her father, John de Bamburgh, was 20 and her mother, Katherine Stanhope, was 22. She married Sir Nicholas Wotton in 1444, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, United Kingdom in 1494. She died in 1495, in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England.

fr.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: Boughton under Blean, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth De Bamburgh est née en 1425, à Paddlesworth, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John de Bamburgh, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Katherine Stanhope, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas Wotton en 1444, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Boughton under Blean, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1494. Elle est décédée en 1495, à Boughton under Blean, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth De Bamburgh 1425 in Paddlesworth, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Bamburgh 20 und ihre Mutter Katherine Stanhope 22. Sie hat 1444 in Lincolnshire, England Sir Nicholas Wotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1494 hat sie in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1495 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England und wurde in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England begraben.

it.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Bamburgh è nata il nel 1425 nel Paddlesworth, Kent, England, sua padre, John de Bamburgh, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Katherine Stanhope, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas Wotton nel 1444, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1494. Morì nel 1495, nel Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England.

ja.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントボウトン ウンダー ブリーン
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Bamburghが1425年にイギリスケントプアッドレスウオルスで生まれた時，父John de Bamburghは20歳，母Katherine Stanhopeは22歳であった。1444年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでSir Nicholas Wottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1494年にはイギリスイギリスケントボウトン ウンダー ブリーンに住んでいた。彼女は1495年にイギリスケントボウトン ウンダー ブリーンで70歳で死去し，イギリスケントボウトン マルハーベにて埋葬された。

ko.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Bamburgh(이)가 1425년 영국 켄트 파들레스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bamburgh(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Stanhope(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 링코실르에서 Sir Nicholas Wotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1494년도에 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인에서 살았다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 부그h턴 말헤르브에 묻혔다.

pt.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Bamburgh nasceu em 1425, em Paddlesworth, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bamburgh, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Stanhope, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas Wotton em 1444, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1494. Ela faleceu em 1495, em Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Boughton, Monchelsea, Kent, England: боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth De Bamburgh родилась в 1425 г. в местности паддлесворт, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Bamburgh было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Stanhope, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas Wotton в 1444 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в 1494 году. Она умерла в 1495 г. в местности боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности боугтон малхирб, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth De Bamburgh nació en 1425, en Paddlesworth, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Bamburgh, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Katherine Stanhope, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas Wotton en 1444, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1494. Murió en 1495, en Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra.
